content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

{"success":true,"schema":"# Table: net_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: sales_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: decision_table
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier
ANLAGE (TEXT) Installation/facility identifier
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
TOUR (TEXT) Tour/route identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
HOUSE_NUM1 (INTEGER) House/building number
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code
AKLASSE_TEXT (TEXT) Customer class description
TARIFTYP (TEXT) Tariff type code
TARIFTYP_TEXT (TEXT) Tariff type description
BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

# Table: net_master
## column_name (type) description

POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code

# Table: sales_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)

CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information

# Table: decision_table

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: process_rules

process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT *, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';

WITH eq_per_haus AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS) UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN eq_per_haus.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END FROM eq_per_haus WHERE J09B_temp.HAUS = eq_per_haus.HAUS;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld');
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN Installation TEXT;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET Installation = (SELECT eablg.Installation FROM eablg WHERE eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = J09B_temp."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." LIMIT 1);
UPDATE J09B_temp SET Installation = (SELECT eanl.Installation FROM eanl WHERE eanl.ABLEINH = J09B_temp.ABLEINH AND eanl.ME_MA_ID = J09B_temp.ME_MA_ID AND eanl.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS LIMIT 1);
UPDATE J09B_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg g WHERE g.Installation = J09B_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1);
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN POST_CODE1_new INTEGER;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN CITY1_new TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN CITY2_new TEXT;
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT;

UPDATE J09B_temp SET 
  TITLE = COALESCE((SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  FORENAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  SURNAME = COALESCE((SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  STREET = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  STREETNO = COALESCE((SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  POST_CODE1_new = COALESCE((SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  CITY1_new = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  CITY2_new = COALESCE((SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)),
  EMAIL = COALESCE((SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09B_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1));
UPDATE J09B_temp SET POST_CODE1 = POST_CODE1_new, CITY1 = CITY1_new, CITY2 = CITY2_new;

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT e1.EQUNR
  FROM eabl e1
  JOIN eabl e2 ON e1.EQUNR = e2.EQUNR
  WHERE e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr(e1."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2024'
    AND substr(e2."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2023'
);

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

args.email: Please find attached the mandatory reading list for process J09B.

args.sqlite_command:
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT e1.EQUNR
  FROM eabl e1
  JOIN eabl e2 ON e1.EQUNR = e2.EQUNR
  WHERE e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
    AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
    AND substr(e1."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2024'
    AND substr(e2."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2023'
);

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING', 'DIRECT_MAIL');

args.email: Please find attached the meter reading decisions for process J09B (excluding mandatory reading and direct mail).

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp;

kwargs.content:
Process `J09B` has been executed end‑to‑end according to the defined rules. Summary:

- Temporary table `J09B_temp` created from `decision_table` (TOUR LIKE `J09B%`) and column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` added.
- Decision rules applied:
  - KSA vs EVU based on number of EQUNR per HAUS (<3 → KSA, else EVU).
  - EVU enforced for:
    - `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between 500–599
    - `HOUSE_NUM1` between 900–999
    - Address areas `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld`.
- Data enriched via joins:
  - Installation and meter reading document number inferred using `EABLG` and `EANL` logic.
  - Customer/contact data merged from `SALES_MASTER` (preferred) and `NET_MASTER` (fallback).

- Special flagging based on `EABL` history:
  - `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'` for EQUNR with:
    - `ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'` in 2023 and 2024.
  - `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'` for EQUNR with:
    - `ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'` in 2023 and 2024.

Exports and notifications:

1. `MANDATORY_READING`
   - CSV: `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
   - Rows: 179
   - Sent via email to: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`

2. `DIRECT_MAIL`
   - CSV: `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`
   - Rows: 949
   - Uploaded to `send_bulk_mail` service  
   - Result: 949 direct emails triggered.

3. Remaining cases (neither `MANDATORY_READING` nor `DIRECT_MAIL`)
   - CSV: `J09B.csv`
   - Rows: 3657
   - Sent via email to: `meter.readings@evu.com`

- Cleanup: Temporary table `J09B_temp` has been dropped.

If you’d like, I can also show you the exact SQL used for any of these steps.
